meaning: 巴尔喀什湖[哈萨克东南部](中国古称夷播海)
examples: The rivers drain into the Balkhash lake, which sustains the livelihood of more than two million Kazakhs.
Perhaps exaggerating, the UN Development Programme (UNDP) has said Lake Balkhash could turn into a salty mess, like the Aral Sea;
The Balkhash lake, he said, was “losing water.” “The water level is now lower by more than two metres to what it was three decades ago.
